message:
test(engine): assert consumer_routes on metamorphic operator catalog and structured repros

Strengthens the structured reduction operator catalog test to verify that
all operators carry the expected consumer_routes vector (parity,
law_mining, docs, frontier_hole) and that structured repro entries
include the same routes. Consolidates the expected routes into a shared
local variable to keep the assertions DRY.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
